rules: all daemons must have an easy visible stop mechanism
all daemons must write clear local logs
no hidden persistence — must be explicitly started
personal or confidential data must never leave the machine without approval

daemons.notes: Watch a local folder for changes and trigger a reviewed safe local action. No external sends.
Maintain a lightweight local session state file for multi-step workflows. Read/write local only.
Run periodic local health and status checks, write results to a local log file.
Poll upstream repo for changes on a schedule. Requires approval — external read connection.
